questions.question: What landmark bears an inscription that ends, "I lift my lamp beside the golden door"?
What network launched its cable channel with the imaginatively-named 60 Minutes More and 48 Hours Later?
What future New York mayor put Ivan Boesky behind bars in 1987?
What does an Alabama-approved disclaimer in biology textbooks describe as only "a controversial theory"?
What's the only major golf tournament for men played on the same course each year?
What company sells lipstick and nail polish with brand names like Asphyxia, Gangrene and Plague?
